---
title: Ministry of Education Portal Redesign
description: A high-fidelity, GIGW 3.0 compliant Ministry of Education portal landing page built using the Nirmaan UI design system.
---

import { EducationTemplate } from '@nirman/components';
import Playground from '../../../components/Playground.astro';

The `EducationTemplate` is a complete, high-fidelity template showcasing a comprehensive redesign of the official **Ministry of Education (MoE)** portal of the Government of India. 

It demonstrates how Nirmaan's multi-government token override system applies **Central Government (GOI)** branding (Ashoka National Blue and Saffron) dynamically to interactive components.

:::tip[Full-Screen Preview]
To view this government portal redesign full-screen without sidebars or frame restrictions:
👉 **[Open Standalone Redesign in New Tab](/education-demo)**
:::

## 1. Interactive Preview

This live preview showcases the fully responsive Ministry portal. It includes an interactive **Initiatives Bento Grid**, a **Searchable Announcements Desk**, an **Active Video Player simulation**, and support for dark mode / high contrast.

<Playground align="start" bg="container">
  <div style={{ width: '100%', margin: '0 auto', border: '1px solid var(--sl-color-hairline)', borderRadius: '12px', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
    <EducationTemplate client:load />
  </div>
</Playground>

## 2. Core Redesign Accomplishments

This template reimagines traditional government layouts using modern design system guidelines:

- **WCAG 2.2 / GIGW 3.0 Compliance:** Interactive elements satisfy the 44×44px minimum touch target size. All text elements feature compliant contrast (≥ 4.5:1 ratio) for readability.
- **National Government Brand:** Uses `data-brand="goi"` to resolve primary assets to Ashoka National Blue (`#0B3D91`) and accent assets to Saffron (`#FF9933`).
- **Interactive Multimedia Gallery:** Built-in simulated video player that lets users experience an address player with progress-bar intervals, play/pause controls, and time display.
- **Auto-Play Carousel Slider:** Showcases high-impact banners representing digital learning portals (SWAYAM) and policy frameworks (NEP 2020).
- **Local Accessibility Bar:** Users can scale text up to `A++` (1.25x scaling) and toggle contrast modes directly from the utility header.

## 3. Developer Implementation

To use this template in your portal application, import it directly from the components package:

```tsx
import { EducationTemplate } from '@nirman/components';

function EducationPage() {
  return (
    <EducationTemplate />
  );
}

export default EducationPage;
```

## 4. Composition & API

The template is fully constructed from modular **Layer 1** (Elements) and **Layer 2** (Providers) of the Nirmaan UI Component Library:

| Component | Layer | Usage in Education Redesign |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `NirmanProvider` | Layer 2 | Orchestrates theme, contrast, and density updates. |
| `Button` | Layer 1 | Primary action CTAs for course exploration and policy reading. |
| `Dropdown` | Layer 1 | Header language switcher resolving English and Hindi. |
| `Toggle` | Layer 1 | Switches density modes between Compact and Default. |
| `Input` | Layer 1 | High-contrast search box for filtering latest announcements. |
